steps.title: Parallel lines share the same slope
steps.content: Parallel shortcut: equal slopes. The given line $y = 7x + 4$ has slope $7$, so our line also has slope $7$.

steps.title: Check the choices in Desmos
steps.content: Graph the given line, the required point $(0,5)$, and all four answer choices. The correct line must be parallel to $y=7x+4$ and pass through $(0,5)$. Only $y=7x+5$ does both.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Slope $7$ and $y$-intercept $5$ give $y=7x+5$. That matches choice B.
